plugin-osm-slot.name: Places
plugin-osm-slot.description: Local place recognition — shows nearby businesses and POIs with address, hours, phone, directions, and interactive map.

hereApiKey.label: HERE API key
hereApiKey.description: Required. Powers place search and city geocoding. Get a key at developer.here.com.

defaultLat.label: Default latitude
defaultLat.description: Latitude of your default search center.

defaultLon.label: Default longitude
defaultLon.description: Longitude of your default search center.

defaultLocationLabel.label: Default location label
defaultLocationLabel.description: Label shown in the card header, e.g. 'Home' or 'Example City'.

useBrowserGeolocation.label: Ask browser for precise location
useBrowserGeolocation.description: Show a button that lets the browser request your live location for more accurate nearby results.

defaultRadius.label: Search radius
defaultRadius.description: Maximum distance for nearby results. Defaults to 10 miles.

resultsCount.label: Results count
resultsCount.description: How many place cards to show.

customTileUrl.label: Custom map tile URL
customTileUrl.description: Optional raster tile template for the map.

useOsmGeocoder.label: Use OpenStreetMap geocoding
useOsmGeocoder.description: Use Nominatim to validate NLP-derived locations and as a fallback for HERE geocoding.

nominatimEndpoint.label: Nominatim endpoint
nominatimEndpoint.description: Nominatim-compatible search endpoint. The public service is limited to one request per second.
